name: Leonard's Bakery
tagline: Malasada institution since 1952 — get the custard-filled haupia and eat them in the parking lot.
mustOrder: haupia (coconut) malasada puff (the insider's pick over custard)
talkStory: Founded 1952 by Leonard Rego, Portuguese descent — malasadas were traditionally made for Shrove Tuesday by Portuguese plantation immigrants from Madeira and the Azores.
insiderTips: Never refrigerate. Bringing a box of Leonard's to a party or office is a power move.
